title: Signal Processes Should Not Be Security Sensitive
description: This rule checks if signal processes are security sensitive. Security sensitive signal processes can potentially lead to security vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Avoid using security sensitive signal processes

noncompliant.code:
import os

# Noncompliant, using os.kill which can be used for privilege escalation
signal.signal(signal.SIGKILL, os.kill)

compliant.code:
import signal

# Compliant, using signal.signal which is less security sensitive
signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal.SIG_IGN)

why_is_this_an_issue: Security sensitive signal processes can be used for privilege escalation and other security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Avoid using security sensitive signal processes and use less security sensitive alternatives.

metadata.title: Signal Processes Should Not Be Security Sensitive
